reasoning: In Gourdon, early November (e.g., Nov 9) typically experiences higher daily average temperatures (around 9-10°C) compared to early February (e.g., Feb 7, average around 6°C). Assuming independent normal distributions for the daily average temperatures on these two dates, the expected difference is roughly -3.5°C to -4°C. Accounting for the typical variability of winter and autumn temperatures in France (standard deviations of about 3-5°C on any given day), the probability that February 7 is warmer than November 9 is roughly 20-25%.
